def solve(code : Array(String), businessLine : Array(String), isActive : Array(Bool)) : Array(String)
  business_order = {
    "electronics" => 0,
    "grocery" => 1,
    "pharmacy" => 2,

    if a.first != b.first
      a.first < b.first
    else

    end
  end

  valid_coupons.map { |t| t.second }
end
